articles.author: Emmet Livingstone
articles.title: DR Congo Ebola cases rise amid distrust, armed conflict zone - NPR
articles.description: Africa races to contain a fast-spreading Ebola outbreak threatening 10 countries as infections spill from eastern Congo into Uganda.
articles.content: KINSHASA, Democratic Republic of CongoHealth workers in the Democratic Republic of Congo are scrambling to contain an outbreak of Ebola virus, which is suspected to have killed more than 200 people a… [+5340 chars]
